topics.summary: Former President Yoon Suk-yeol's insurrection (내란 우두머리) trial first-instance verdict is scheduled for May 28, with the special prosecutor having already secured a 7-year sentence in the arrest-obstruction appeal. Coverage is intense as the ruling approaches just days before the June 3 local elections.

evidence_headlines.title: 윤석열 내란 재판/전개 — 선고기일 2026년 5월 28일
내란재판 현황 — 한덕수 항소심 징역 15년, 윤석열 체포방해 항소심 징역 7년
[내란 1심 선고] '반성없는 윤석열 감형사유 없어…내란죄 사형해야'

topics.summary: With the nationwide local elections two weeks away, both parties are in full campaign mode: DPK leads most polls and is targeting historically conservative Daegu, while PPP leader Jang Dong-hyeok rallies conservative bases in Yeongnam and attends the May 18 commemoration in Gwangju to expand reach.

evidence_headlines.title: 국힘 지도부, 사흘째 영남권 찾아 보수층 결집…조만간 중앙선대위 구성
정청래·장동혁, 5·18 민주화운동 기념식 참석…'민심다잡기''외연확장'
제9회 전국동시지방선거

topics.topic_en: Fabricated Prosecution Special Counsel Bill Showdown
topics.summary: The DPK-sponsored 'fabricated prosecution special counsel' bill, which would allow a special prosecutor to potentially drop charges against President Lee Jae-myung, is stalled after Lee himself called for deliberation; the PPP has declared all-out opposition, framing it as unconstitutional self-exoneration and a key local-election battle line.

evidence_headlines.title: 민주당 '조작기소 바로잡을 특검 필요' vs 국민의힘 '셀프 면죄부'
與, '지방선거 망할라' 특검법 '멈칫'… 野 '선거용 기만' 총공세
국민의힘 이재명 대통령 공소취소 특검법 원천무효 현장 최고위원회의

topics.topic_ko: 미중 정상회담 후 이재명-트럼프 전화 통화
topics.summary: President Lee Jae-myung spoke by phone with Donald Trump on May 17, receiving a briefing on the outcomes of the US-China summit; the two leaders reaffirmed the Korea-US alliance and the Joint Fact Sheet commitments on Korean Peninsula peace, with Seoul touting its role in facilitating the US-China trade talks.

evidence_headlines.title: 李대통령, 트럼프와 통화…'미중 간 한반도 문제 건설적 협의 평가'
李 '트럼프와 통화, 한·미동맹 굳건함 다시금 확인하는 뜻깊은 시간'
李대통령, 美 트럼프와 통화…미중 정상회담 결과 공유

topics.summary: The DPK-led constitutional amendment bill, which included provisions on martial law, was blocked in the National Assembly when PPP used a filibuster to prevent a vote, causing the simultaneous June 3 referendum to collapse; critics from both sides attacked the outcome as a waste of public funds and a political failure.

evidence_headlines.title: 여야 극한대치 속 개헌 다시 무산…국회 '정치력 실종' 비판 초래
장동혁 지도부, 내일 5·18 기념식 참석…'개헌 반대' 비판엔 '졸속 추진 반대한 것'
제10차 개헌/제22대 국회 개헌안

topics.topic_en: Han Dong-hoon Busan By-election and PPP Faction War
topics.topic_ko: 한동훈 부산 북구갑 출마·국민의힘 계파 갈등
topics.summary: Former PPP leader Han Dong-hoon filed as an independent candidate in the Busan North-gu byelection, attacking both DPK governance and current PPP leadership; party brass threatened to discipline MPs who visited Han's campaign, deepening the rift between the Jang Dong-hyeok faction and pro-Han forces ahead of the June 3 vote.

evidence_headlines.title: 한동훈, 부산 북구갑 출마 선언…공소 취소에 '李 탄핵' 언급
국힘, '한동훈 예방' 한지아 징계 시사…당권파 vs 친한계 또 충돌
국힘, '반특검' 결집…한동훈發 내홍 조짐이 변수

topics.topic_en: Samsung Strike and 'National Dividend' Semiconductor Tax Debate
topics.summary: Samsung Electronics' union announced an 18-day total strike (May 21–June 7) over profit-sharing demands, while a separate controversy erupted after a senior Blue House aide floated a 'national dividend' concept—redistributing semiconductor super-cycle tax windfalls—causing a sharp KOSPI sell-off and overseas investor unease.

evidence_headlines.title: '국민배당금' 논란 뒤 남은 질문…반도체 초과세수, 어디에 쓸 것인가
'대화? 일단 파업 먼저 하고'…끝내 '강행' 선언
8000 앞 고꾸라진 코스피… '국민 배당금' 김용범 탓일까, 아닐까

topics.topic_en: Lee Presidential Approval Rating at 61 Percent
topics.summary: The latest Gallup Korea poll (May 12–14) showed President Lee Jae-myung's job-approval slipping 3 points to 61%, still high but the lowest since inauguration, with the DPK at 45% and PPP at 23%; the dip is attributed partly to controversy over the fabricated-prosecution special counsel bill and the national dividend remarks.

evidence_headlines.title: 이재명 대통령 지지율 61%, 민주당 45%·국민의힘 23%
[정치] 이 대통령 지지율 67%…민주 46%·국민의힘 18% [NBS]
이재명/지지율

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
